debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
pivot : α
l : List α
x : α
⊢ List.count x l = List.count x (smaller α inst✝ pivot l) + List.count x (larger α inst✝ pivot l)

proof:
induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons h t ih =>
    simp only [smaller, larger, List.filter_cons]
    rcases le_or_lt h pivot with hle | hgt
    · simp [hle, not_lt_of_le hle, List.count_cons, ih]
      split_ifs <;> omega
    · simp [not_le_of_lt hgt, hgt, List.count_cons, ih]
      split_ifs <;> omega
successful_attempts:
induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons h t ih =>
    simp only [smaller, larger, List.filter_cons]
    rcases le_or_lt h pivot with hle | hgt
    · simp [hle, not_lt_of_le hle, List.count_cons, ih]
      split_ifs <;> omega
    · simp [not_le_of_lt hgt, hgt, List.count_cons, ih]
      split_ifs <;> omega
